prompt: Hyper-realistic vertical full-body outdoor fashion portrait. A stylish young adult East Asian woman standing in the center of a narrow historical ancient village alley, facing the camera. From the top of the head to about mid-calf—the lower part of the pants extends beyond the edge of the screen. The head is in the upper middle of the screen, the torso along the central vertical axis, with enough surrounding architectural environment to establish a sense of place. Relaxed posture, one hip slightly shifted, arms hanging naturally, hands close to the upper thighs. Head tilted gently toward the right shoulder, looking directly at the camera with a warm, natural smile. Subject: Slender and elegant figure, warm and fair skin, exquisite features, almond-shaped deep brown eyes, soft arched eyebrows, refined nose bridge, natural rose-red lip color. Friendly, quiet, and approachable expression—not an intentional pose. Minimalist makeup: glowing natural skin, light peach blush, thin brown eyeliner, soft eyelashes, neutral eye shadow, bright coral pink lip color. Real skin texture, faint pores, exquisite facial highlights, smooth and realistic color transitions. Hairstyle: Extremely long, thick deep brown-black hair extending below the waist—loose natural waves, slightly parted, with soft volume at the crown. Most of the hair falls over the left shoulder and flows along the front of the torso; another long section flows behind the right arm. Fine strands of hair around the forehead and cheeks suggest a slight outdoor breeze. Soft edge lighting highlights individual hair strands without artificial gloss. Clothing: Fitted nude beige lace camisole—extra-fine spaghetti straps, soft scalloped neckline, exquisite full floral lace pattern with fine interlocking vines, circles, and embroidered flowers. Tonal skin-tone beige soft lining—exquisite tonal effect, no transparency. Fits the body, stops at the natural waistline, with real tension, small folds, and visible lace relief. High-waisted ivory or warm cream wide-leg trousers—the waistband fits just below the camisole, elegant front pleats open into loose vertical folds, wide trouser legs, flowing drape. Slightly warm off-white rather than pure white; delicate woven texture, soft shadows within the folds, natural wrinkles at the waist and hips. Accessories: Small shiny gold pendant necklace—a rounded abstract pendant on a fine chain located on the upper chest. Delicate and low-key stud earrings. A thin gold bracelet on each wrist, and another extra-fine bracelet near one wrist. Short clean nails painted in a light neutral color. Hands are anatomically accurate: relaxed fingers, real joints, natural spacing. Scene: Quiet traditional Jiangnan water town or historical ancient village alley. An old rectangular grey slate road stretching from the lower foreground to the distance—uneven and weathered, irregular gaps, faint moss, small cracks, low-key beige-grey variations. The slate road serves as a strong leading line to guide the eye deep into the alley. Left side: A tall light-colored plaster wall close to the camera—delicate stains, discoloration, signs of aging. Behind the woman's left shoulder: A dark wooden doorway under an exquisite traditional roofed corridor with carved structural details. On the left edge, there are lush green shrubs growing in a rough raised stone flower pot. Right side: A white plaster building with dark roof tiles, an embedded doorway, stone foundations, and a narrow overhanging eave—the building extends toward the central background to form a soft-focus blurred corridor. In the upper background, there are several mature green trees rising above the roofs—low-key olive green and sage green naturally blend into the cream walls and grey roofs. Shallow depth of field: The woman is sharp and clear, the nearest architectural edges retain some texture, and distant doorways/roofs/vegetation turn into creamy bokeh spots. Retains enough recognizable architectural structure to convey a real historical ancient village atmosphere. Lighting: Soft diffused late morning sunlight from the upper left and front, filtered through light clouds—with exquisite highlights on the forehead, cheeks, bridge of the nose, collarbone, shoulders, lace top, and forearms. There is a restrained warm rim light on the edges of the hair. Soft open shadows under the jaw, hair, and trouser folds. No harsh direct sunlight or strong cast shadows. Color Tones: Cream white, nude beige, light stone grey, weathered charcoal grey, low-key green, soft brown, restrained gold. Glowing warm skin tones, no orange saturation. Soft cinematic tones, smooth highlight transitions, slightly low-key background colors, transparent and elegant contrast. Camera: Waist to chest height, full frame 85mm, f/2–f/2.8, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on eyes and lace texture, smooth background separation. High-end lifestyle fashion or exquisite travel photography quality—natural, elegant, romantic, sophisticated. Negative: No text, no logo, no watermark, no extra people, no modern vehicles, no street signs, no wire clutter, no exaggerated glamour makeup, no plastic-looking skin, no deformed fingers, no repeated limbs, no deformed architecture, no over-saturated colors, no artificial HDR, no strong studio lighting.

promptZh: 超写实竖构图全身户外时尚人像。一位 时尚的东亚年轻女性 站在 狭窄的历史古村落巷道 中央，面向镜头。画面从头顶延伸至小腿中部——裤装下摆延伸至画面边缘之外。头部位于画面中上部，躯干沿中心垂直轴线分布，周围保留足够的建筑环境以营造空间感。姿态放松，一侧髋部微斜，双臂自然下垂，双手靠近大腿上部。头部轻微向右肩倾斜，直视镜头，带着温暖自然的微笑。主体：身材修长优雅，肤色温润白皙，五官精致，深褐色杏仁眼，柔和的拱形眉，鼻梁挺拔，唇色呈自然的玫瑰红。表情亲切、安静且平易近人——非刻意摆拍。极简妆容：透亮自然的肤质，淡桃色腮红，细棕色眼线，柔软睫毛，中性色眼影，亮珊瑚粉唇色。真实的皮肤纹理，隐约可见的毛孔，精致的面部高光，平滑逼真的色彩过渡。发型：极长且浓密的深棕黑色秀发垂至腰部以下——自然松散的波浪卷，中分，头顶蓬松有质感。大部分头发垂落在左肩并沿躯干前侧流淌；另一束长发垂在右臂后方。额头和脸颊周围的细碎发丝暗示着户外微风。柔和的轮廓光勾勒出单根发丝，无人工光泽。服装：修身 裸米色 蕾丝吊带衫——极细肩带，柔和的扇形领口，精致的全蕾丝花纹，带有细腻的藤蔓、圆圈和刺绣花朵图案。同色系肤色内衬——精致的同色调效果，无透视感。贴合身体，长度至自然腰线，具有真实的张力、细微褶皱和可见的蕾丝浮雕感。高腰象牙白或暖奶油色阔腿裤——腰头位于吊带衫下方，优雅的前褶展开为宽松的垂直褶皱，裤腿宽大，垂坠感极佳。色调偏暖的灰白色而非纯白；细腻的织物纹理，褶皱处有柔和阴影，腰部和臀部有自然的褶皱。配饰：小巧闪亮的金色吊坠项链——细链条上挂着一个圆润的抽象吊坠，位于胸前上方。精致低调的耳钉。每只手腕各戴一只细金手镯，其中一只手腕附近还有一只极细的手镯。指甲修剪整齐，涂有浅中性色指甲油。手部解剖结构准确：手指放松，关节真实，间距自然。场景：安静的江南水乡或历史古村落巷道。一条古老的矩形青石板路从前景下方延伸至远方——路面凹凸不平且饱经风霜，缝隙不规则，带有淡淡的青苔、细小裂纹，呈现低调的米灰色变化。石板路作为强有力的引导线，将视线引向巷道深处。左侧：靠近镜头的一面高大浅色抹灰墙——带有细腻的污渍、变色和岁月痕迹。女子左肩后方：一座精致的传统廊檐下的深色木门，带有雕刻的结构细节。左侧边缘有生长在粗糙凸起石花盆里的茂密绿色灌木。右侧：一座带有深色瓦片的白色抹灰建筑，嵌入式门洞，石基座，窄小的出檐——建筑向中心背景延伸，形成柔焦模糊的廊道。背景上方，几棵成熟的绿树高出屋顶——低调的橄榄绿和鼠尾草绿自然地融入奶油色墙面和灰色屋顶中。浅景深：人物清晰锐利，最近处的建筑边缘保留一定纹理，远处的门洞、屋顶和植被转化为奶油般的虚化光斑。保留足够的建筑结构识别度，以传达真实的古村落氛围。光影：来自左上方和前方的柔和漫射晨光，经由薄云过滤——额头、脸颊、鼻梁、锁骨、肩膀、蕾丝上衣和前臂上有精致的高光。发丝边缘有克制的暖色轮廓光。下颌、头发和裤褶下方有柔和的开放式阴影。无强烈的直射阳光或浓重的投影。色调：奶油白、裸米色、浅石灰、风化炭灰、低调绿、柔棕色、克制的金色。温暖透亮的肤色，无橙色饱和度。柔和的电影色调，平滑的高光过渡，背景色调略微低调，对比度通透优雅。相机：腰部至胸部高度，全画幅 85mm 镜头，f/2–f/2.8，浅景深，焦点清晰对准眼睛和蕾丝纹理，背景分离自然。高端生活方式时尚或精致旅行摄影质感——自然、优雅、浪漫、高级。负向提示：无文字、无标志、无水印、无额外人物、无现代车辆、无路标、无杂乱电线、无夸张的浓妆、无塑料感皮肤、无畸形手指、无重复肢体、无畸形建筑、无过饱和色彩、无人工 HDR、无强烈的影棚灯光。
